MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Telephone (415)989-4730, appearing for Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.;
No other appearance.

The Court makes the following ruling:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC., motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is to granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
